panels.title: Prosta sekcija 1 - tranzicije trajanja od 1 do 5 dana
panels.description: Dobavljanje task_phase_transitions slogova za izabrani projekat gde je durationSeconds izmedju 1 i 5 dana.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "project-analytics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "task_phase_transitions")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "durationSeconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["projectName"] == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] >= 86400 and r["_value"] <= 432000)
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "projectName", "taskId", "fromPhase", "toPhase", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "Vreme", projectName: "Projekat", taskId: "Task", fromPhase: "Od faze", toPhase: "Do faze", _value: "Trajanje (s)"})

panels.title: Prosta sekcija 2 - tranzicije sa 15 do 30 story poena
panels.description: Dobavljanje task_phase_transitions slogova za izabrani projekat gde je broj story poena izmedju 15 i 30.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "project-analytics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "task_phase_transitions")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "storyPoints")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["projectName"] == "${project}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] >= 15 and r["_value"] <= 30)
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "projectName", "taskId", "fromPhase", "toPhase", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "Vreme", projectName: "Projekat", taskId: "Task", fromPhase: "Od faze", toPhase: "Do faze", _value: "Story poeni"})

panels.title: Složena sekcija — prosečno trajanje po fazi
panels.description: Složen upit: mean(durationSeconds) grupisano po fromPhase.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "project-analytics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "task_phase_transitions")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "durationSeconds")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["projectName"] == "${project}")
  |> group(columns: ["fromPhase"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
